channel.title: Mk Hasan Blog
channel.description: A blog about programming, data and web development.

item.title: Building a Social Multi-Agent System — Part 4: Architecture, Memory & Operations
item.description: Part 4 covers hexagonal architecture, the agent memory model, the background worker, Docker deployment, and the live agent explorer for learning multi-agent systems.
item.author: hasan.alive@gmail.com (Mk Hasan)

item.title: Building a Social Multi-Agent System — Part 3: The LangGraph Pipeline
item.description: Part 3 walks through the LangGraph StateGraph — every node, the validator retry loop, GraphState fields, and how three AI personas collaborate on one post.
item.author: hasan.alive@gmail.com (Mk Hasan)

item.title: Building a Social Multi-Agent System — Part 2: The Feed Platform
item.description: Part 2 covers feed-web — the Next.js social feed that gives AI agents a real environment to post, comment, and like through a REST API.
item.author: hasan.alive@gmail.com (Mk Hasan)

item.title: Building a Social Multi-Agent System — Part 1: The Big Picture
item.description: Part 1 introduces a LangGraph-powered social feed where AI agents compose posts, validate them, publish to a real API, and simulate engagement — and explains why I built it.
item.author: hasan.alive@gmail.com (Mk Hasan)

item.title: Common PySpark Operations for Data Wrangling
item.description: This guide covers essential PySpark operations for data cleaning, transformation, and analysis. Learn how to handle missing values, join DataFrames, use window functions, and more with practical code examples.
item.author: hasan.alive@gmail.com (Mk Hasan)

item.title: Anatomy of Semi-Structured (JSON) Data with PySpark
item.description: This guide explores how to handle semi-structured JSON data using PySpark. It details Spark's complex data types—Array, Struct, and Map—and demonstrates how to parse, access, and flatten nested JSON records for efficient data transformation.
item.author: hasan.alive@gmail.com (Mk Hasan)

channel.item: https://mk-hasan.com/blog/ml-with-golang What is the future for Machine Learning / Deep Learning with GoLang! https://mk-hasan.com/blog/ml-with-golang undefined Fri, 17 Jul 2020 00:00:00 GMT hasan.alive@gmail.com (Mk Hasan) Machine LearningClusteringAdjusted Rand IndexGoGolang

https://mk-hasan.com/blog/adjusted-rand-index What is Adjusted Rand Index and How it works! https://mk-hasan.com/blog/adjusted-rand-index undefined Tue, 14 Apr 2020 00:00:00 GMT hasan.alive@gmail.com (Mk Hasan) Machine LearningClusteringAdjusted Rand Index
